# MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode.linear

**Case**

Sampling at texture coordinates between texels should linearly interpolate between texel values.

## Declaration

```swift
case linear
```

## Constants

- **MDLMaterialTextureFilterMode.nearest**: Sampling at texture coordinates between texels should return the value of the nearest texel.
